title: DeqqRe3 Customize Extra
description: Customize Performance and Graphics with Fabric.
body:
ModPack Minecraft "DeqqRe3 Customize Extra" Optimization Focusing Performance and Graphics.

Performance - Customize Modern Performance mods Sodium and more!

Works Everywhere - No Content mods. works any Client Servers.

Customize - Don't Break the Vanilla Feel. add Chat History. Fixes Bugs and Utilities.

Built on Fabric - Fabric is LightWeight. and Still Has Great Mods Support.
